summary: RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) implementation fully tested. All 4 roles (User, Advertiser, Admin, Super Admin) work correctly with proper sidebar access and permissions. Login, logout, registration, admin panel, and user management features all functioning correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1, -1) - charts render fine but show warning

critical_code_review_comments: Backend RBAC implementation is solid with proper role hierarchy enforcement
Admin cannot create admin/super_admin accounts - only Super Admin can
Users cannot self-register as admin or super_admin roles
Logout properly invalidates tokens in database
Protected routes correctly redirect unauthenticated users to login
Admin Panel correctly shows Users, Sidebar Access, and Permissions tabs for Super Admin
seed_data_creation: Demo accounts already seeded: user@demo.com, advertiser@demo.com, admin@demo.com, superadmin@demo.com (password: demo123 for all)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC system fully functional. Test users can be cleaned up by Super Admin in Admin Panel.

login_page_demo_buttons.description: Login page shows 4 demo account quick login buttons: User, Advertiser, Admin, Super Admin
login_page_demo_buttons.evidence: Screenshot shows login page with all 4 demo buttons visible

user_role_sidebar_access.description: User role sees only Dashboard and Reports in sidebar
user_role_sidebar_access.evidence: Fresh login shows only 'Dashboard' and 'Reports' in sidebar

advertiser_role_sidebar_access.description: Advertiser sees Dashboard, Campaigns, Creatives, Reports, Ad Performance, Budget Pacing, Insights
advertiser_role_sidebar_access.evidence: Advertiser sidebar shows correct 7 menu items

admin_role_sidebar_access.description: Admin sees most items except Admin Panel
admin_role_sidebar_access.evidence: Admin sidebar shows 19 items, Admin Panel is NOT visible

superadmin_role_sidebar_access.description: Super Admin sees ALL items including Admin Panel and Migration
superadmin_role_sidebar_access.evidence: Super Admin sidebar shows all 21 items including Admin Panel

admin_panel_access.description: Super Admin can access Admin Panel at /admin
admin_panel_access.evidence: Screenshot shows Admin Panel with 6 users listed

admin_panel_users_tab.description: Admin Panel Users tab shows all users with role, status, and actions
admin_panel_users_tab.evidence: Users table shows Demo User, Demo Advertiser, Demo Admin, Super Admin

admin_panel_sidebar_access_tab.description: Admin Panel Sidebar Access tab allows configuring menu items per role
admin_panel_sidebar_access_tab.evidence: Screenshot shows checkboxes for configuring sidebar items per role

admin_panel_permissions_tab.description: Admin Panel Permissions tab allows configuring permissions per role
admin_panel_permissions_tab.evidence: Permissions tab exists and is accessible by Super Admin

logout_functionality.description: Logout invalidates token and redirects to login
logout_functionality.evidence: Backend test confirms token is invalidated, frontend redirects to /login

unauthenticated_redirect.description: Unauthenticated users are redirected to login page
unauthenticated_redirect.evidence: Navigating to /dashboard without auth redirects to /login

user_profile_in_sidebar.description: Sidebar shows user name and role badge
user_profile_in_sidebar.evidence: Screenshots show 'Demo User' with 'user' badge, 'Super Admin' with 'super admin' badge

role_based_api_protection.description: Admin endpoints protected by role checks

self_registration_restrictions.description: Users cannot self-register as admin or super_admin
self_registration_restrictions.evidence: Backend tests confirm 403 for admin/super_admin self-registration
